creative_brief: Split screen showing a product label with farm details next to the actual farm/farmer photo, emphasizing the direct connection.
primary_text:
Do you know the name of the farm that raised your last steak? Rachel's cattle graze on regenerative pastures in Kempsey NSW. No hormones, no feedlots. Collins catches our salmon wild off the South Coast. Every product shows the farm name, the farmer's story, and how it was grown. No middlemen marking up prices along a 2,400km supply chain. Collect fresh from Brookvale hub Monday to Friday.

No middlemen. No commitment. Sydney families collect from the Brookvale hub, Monday to Friday.
headline: See your farm before you buy
description: Every product shows the farmer's name and story. Collect from Brookvale hub.
